title: Speedometer Resource Pack
description: A resources pack for the Speedometer mod that chages the default visual speedometer
body:
This is the extra/example/optinal resourcepack for [Speedometer](https://modrinth.com/mod/speedometer)

It provides a Quarter Circle speedometer as a visual speedometer.

To create your own please check out [resourcepack.md](https://github.com/zaze06/Speedometer/blob/master/resourcepack.md) in the mods Github repository

If issues arises make sure that you state it's related to the resource pack!
